headline: Barclays Maintains Equal-Weight on Mosaic, Lowers Price Target to $26
summary: Barclays  analyst Benjamin Theurer   maintains Mosaic (NYSE:MOS) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $31 to $26.
